parameters.subject: =🔔 New Lead: {{ $json.opportunityType }} at {{ $json.serviceAddress }}
parameters.message:
=

New Lead Available

A new {{ $json.opportunityType }} opportunity has been matched to you.

Address: {{ $json.serviceAddress }}
Estimated Value: ${{ $json.estimatedValue }}
Confidence: {{ $json.confidence }}%

This lead expires in 24 hours.

View Lead →

_meta.description: Fires when a lead is dispatched to a partner. Sends both SMS (Twilio) and email (Resend) simultaneously. Webhook payload: { event, partnerPhone, partnerEmail, opportunityType, serviceAddress, estimatedValue, confidence }
_meta.setup: 1. Set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER env vars in n8n. 2. Set webhook URL in ProLnk admin → Settings → Webhooks → Lead Dispatched. 3. Activate workflow.
